untranslatable_reason: Broadening Formation is a complex pattern-recognition signal requiring identification of: (1) downward trend over preceding month, (2) two diverging trend lines, (3) multiple minor highs and lows, (4) upward breakout above top trend line. These elements require trend line detection and swing point identification which are not available in the allowed indicator set. The allowed indicators include moving averages, momentum oscillators, and volatility measures, but lack explicit trend line and pattern recognition functions. A proxy entry using price breakout above Bollinger Band upper has been provided, but this does not capture the true broadening formation mechanics described in the original signal.
translation_notes: Signal requires manual pattern identification of broadening formation with diverging trend lines. Substituted with Bollinger Band breakout as a volume-aware breakout proxy. Recommend implementing custom trend line detection or swing point identification logic in backtest engine for accurate Bulkowski pattern recognition.
